overview: A.M. Reddy Memorial College of Engineering and Technology (AMRN), Narasaraopet, was established in 2008 by A.M. Reddy Educational Society. The official college website presents AMRN as an AICTE-approved, JNTU Kakinada-affiliated engineering institution with undergraduate, postgraduate, and polytechnic offerings in a green campus near Petlurivaripalem.
accreditation: AICTE approved; affiliated to JNTU Kakinada.

admissions.admissionProcess: The official AMRN site lists the college's AP EAPCET, POLYCET, and ECET codes and publishes institute and university examination notifications. First-year B.Tech admissions are handled through AP EAMCET counseling, with lateral-entry and PG admissions following the relevant state counseling routes.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAMCET, AP ECET, and AP PGECET schedules are announced by APSCHE each cycle, while institute-specific notices are posted on the AMRN website.

facilities: Digital library with 17,000+ books and journals
campus.specialNote: The official about page also references a 14.5-acre green campus profile and highlights a solar power plant along with strong road and rail access from Narasaraopet.

contact.address: Vinukonda Road, Petlurivaripalem, Narasaraopet - 522601, Andhra Pradesh, India
